sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Roberta guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Roberta Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Roberta
hero.summary: The build keeps SPD neck plus ATK% ring while letting the two-piece set carry the defensive adjustment. From there, move into the Late survival route once the core stat line is stable.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Roberta feels best once Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and ATK% ring.
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and ATK%.
Journey: Hard route leans toward DPS - AX6.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Ultimate >= Special >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Ultimate
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Special
steps.detail: Special is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep Speed and Crit Rate stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 4 / 6, with 7 / 8 / 8 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Core bruiser line with Destruction (4pc) + Valor (2pc) and Speed necklace and ATK% ring. Move into the Late survival route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Core bruiser
sets.note: Core bruiser keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: Late survival
sets.note: The tab also shows a defensive two-piece fallback for sturdier bruiser play.

priorities: Substats: SPD, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, ATK(%)

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and ATK% ring, then stack Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and ATK% through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: ★☆☆ Works fine at base copy
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and ATK%

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Lacy and Bunny Frey. Fill the remaining slots with Roberta or Harley, Charlotte, and Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: Veteran's Instinct
items.summary: Roberta's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Commence Operation
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Fast Track
items.summary: Special is the next major breakpoint after the opener and usually carries the mid-cycle payoff.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: On-Site Emergency Judgment
items.summary: Ultimate anchors the opener and stays at the top of the investment order for this build.
